doc_title: van Berg, Kowalski & Wright (2025). Learning-Styles-Matched Instruction: A Meta-Analysis of 124 Studies. Educational Psychology Review, 37(3), 612-651.
label: fabricated
reason: The document presents a fictitious study with future-dated metadata that contradicts the broad scientific consensus regarding the lack of evidence for learning-styles-matched instruction.
